Boat Details

Make Pathfinder
Model 2700 Open
Year 2023
Condition Used
Price US$155,000
Type Power
Class Center Console
Length 27 ft
Fuel Type Gas
Hull Material Fiberglass
Location Kemah, Texas

Measurements

LOA 26 ft 12 in
Beam 9 ft 4 in
Min. Draft 1 ft 5 in
Deadrise at Transom 18°
Dry Weight 4934 lb

Propulsion

Engine Type Outboard
Engine Make Yamaha
Engine Model 425 XTO
Fuel Type Gas
Engine Year 2023
Power 425 hp
Engine Location enums.engine-location.center
Engine usage (hours) 110

Other Specifications

Guest Heads 1
Fuel Tanks 126 gal
Hull Shape Modified Vee

Description

2023 Pathfinder 2700 Open

Built to impress with a great mix of power, control, and fishability. The Yamaha 425 XTO outboard delivers strong, smooth performance, while the joystick makes docking and maneuvering easy. Garmin electronics keep everything clear and simple at the helm, and the jackplate with twin Power-Poles gives you excellent control in shallow water. Whether you’re running offshore or fishing the flats, this boat is set up to make every day on the water easier and more enjoyable. Contact the listing broker, Max Schulze, to schedule your private showing.

Family Features - Comfort and Convenience

  • Anchor locker
  • Boarding ladder
  • Center console w/ side access
  • Self-bailing cockpit
  • Large Guttered, Gasketed, Locking Dry Storage Compartments (4)
  • Cooler mounted in front of console w/ cushion set (deluxe Engel cooler)

Lights and Electric - Battery & Accessories

  • 12-volt Accessory Jack & USB Charging Jack
  • Main breakers w/ independent house & TM battery switches
  • Waterproof switch panel w/ circuit breakers

Livewells and Pumps - Available Details

  • Automatic Bilge Pump
  • Livewell (22-gallon, aft center)

Fishing Features - Andvanced Angling Details

  • Springline Cleats (Non-Folding)
  • Compass
  • Console Windshield & Grabrail
  • Flush-mount Bow Cleat (8 in)
  • Flush-mount Stern Cleat (2)
  • In-deck Castnet Storage Locker
  • In-deck Locking Storage (Port & Stbd)
  • Insulated Fish Box (43 gal)
  • Console rod rack (1 port, 4-bank)
  • Flush-mount gunnel rod holder (4)
  • Under-gunnel rod storage
  • TM wiring system complete with battery tray(s)

Upgrades and Electronics

  • Jackplate
  • Dual Power Poles Blades
  • Yamaha Joystick

disclaimer

The Company offers the details of this vessel in good faith but cannot guarantee or warrant the accuracy of this information nor warrant the condition of the vessel. A buyer should instruct his agents, or his surveyors, to investigate such details as the buyer desires validated. This vessel is offered subject to prior sale, price change, or withdrawal without notice.

Mechanical Disclaimer

Engine and generator hours are as of the date of the original listing and are a representation of what the listing broker is told by the owner and/or actual reading of the engine hour meters. The broker cannot guarantee the true hours. It is the responsibility of the purchaser and/or his agent to verify engine hours, warranties implied or otherwise and major overhauls as well as all other representations noted on the listing.
